# Data download instructions

Rules:
- Do not commit data to Git.
- Put downloads in `data/raw/<project>/...`
- Put cleaned outputs in `data/processed/<project>/...`

## Notes
If a dataset requires Kaggle:
- Install kaggle CLI
- Add Kaggle API token (`~/.kaggle/kaggle.json`)
- Document the exact dataset slug and command here
